summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Driver Gig CRM after pixel-perfect CSS redesign. All core functionality verified with excellent results. Login, Dashboard, Companies, Pipeline, Activity Log, Earnings Tracker, and Settings pages all working correctly. CompanyDrawer with all sections including AI recommendation and activity timeline functioning properly.

design_issues.issue: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Login with test@example.com / Test123! - SUCCESS
Dashboard page loads with 4 KPI cards (Total Companies: 10, Active Gigs: 3, Applications Pending: 4, Overdue Follow-ups: 1)
Dashboard shows Recent Activity section with activity entries
Dashboard shows Upcoming Follow-ups section with company follow-ups
Dashboard Quick Add Company button redirects to Companies page with modal open
Companies page loads with search box and filter pills
Companies page shows 10 companies in table with avatar circles, status badges, priority badges, active states column
Companies search functionality works - searching 'Amazon' filters to 1 company
Companies filter pills work - filtering 'Active' shows 3 companies
Add Company button opens modal with all form fields (Company Name, Website, Phone, Active States, Work Model, Service Type, Vehicles Accepted)
Clicking company row opens CompanyDrawer with all sections:
- Save bar with Save Changes button
- Company name and pills (service type, vehicles)
- Status/Priority badges
- Contact info (website, phone, active states)
- Personnel box (name, title, email, phone, LinkedIn, contact method)
- Dropdowns (Status, Handler, Priority)
- Follow-up date and Sign-up URL inputs
- Notes textarea
- Work Model chips (App/On Demand, Route, Fleet, Other)
- Service Type chips
- Vehicles Accepted chips
- Active States grid with All 50 and Clear All buttons
- AI Recommendation box with actual LLM-generated recommendation
- Log Activity button
- Activity Timeline with entries
- Documents section with Upload and Photo buttons (MOCKED - UI only)
- Work Model Key footnote
- Delete Company button
Pipeline page shows 6 kanban columns (Researching: 2, Applied: 2, Waiting: 2, Offered: 1, Active: 3, Overdue: 0)
Pipeline shows 10 draggable kanban cards with company name, priority badge, handler, and follow-up date
Activity Log page shows activities table with type badges, outcome badges, next action links
Activity Log Export CSV button present
Earnings Tracker shows 3 summary cards (Weekly: $663, Monthly: $663, Yearly: $663)
Earnings Tracker shows earnings table with green net values
Earnings Tracker Log Earnings button present
Settings page shows Handler Management section with rename/delete buttons
Settings page shows User Profile form (Name, Email, Primary Vehicle, Primary Market)
Settings page shows Data Management section (Export All Data, Import Companies, Load 10 Sample Companies)
Sidebar navigation works correctly for all pages
Logout button works - redirects to login page
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add DialogDescription to AddCompanyModal and CompanyDrawer Sheet components to fix accessibility warning
seed_data_creation: 10 sample companies already seeded with activities and earnings data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages and features are working correctly after the pixel-perfect CSS redesign. The app uses custom CSS classes from App.css (e.g., .sidebar, .page, .kpi-card, .tbl, .badge, etc.) instead of heavy Tailwind. CompanyDrawer uses Shadcn Sheet component. Document upload in CompanyDrawer is UI-only (MOCKED - no backend endpoint). AI recommendation is working with real LLM integration.

mocked_apis.Document upload in CompanyDrawer: UI-only, no backend endpoint for file upload
